Properties.commandText:
SELECT "w"."Id", "w"."CategoryId", "w"."created_at", "w"."Description", "w"."display_name", "w"."Domain", "w"."IsActive", "w"."Name", "w"."url_sample", "c"."Id", "c"."Description", "c"."IsActive", "c"."Name", "c"."Slug", "c0"."Id", "c0"."AvgAccuracy", "c0"."AvgBiasNeutrality", "c0"."AvgSafetyTrust", "c0"."AvgTransparency", "c0"."ComputedAt", "c0"."RatingCount", "c0"."Score", "c0"."WebsiteId"
FROM "Websites" AS "w"
INNER JOIN "Categories" AS "c" ON "w"."CategoryId" = "c"."Id"
LEFT JOIN "CredibilitySnapshots" AS "c0" ON "w"."Id" = "c0"."WebsiteId"
WHERE instr("w"."Domain", @normalizedQuery) > 0 OR instr(lower("w"."Name"), @ToLower) > 0

Properties.commandText:
SELECT "w"."Id", "w"."CategoryId", "w"."created_at", "w"."Description", "w"."display_name", "w"."Domain", "w"."IsActive", "w"."Name", "w"."url_sample", "c"."Id", "c"."Description", "c"."IsActive", "c"."Name", "c"."Slug", "c0"."Id", "c0"."AvgAccuracy", "c0"."AvgBiasNeutrality", "c0"."AvgSafetyTrust", "c0"."AvgTransparency", "c0"."ComputedAt", "c0"."RatingCount", "c0"."Score", "c0"."WebsiteId"
FROM "Websites" AS "w"
INNER JOIN "Categories" AS "c" ON "w"."CategoryId" = "c"."Id"
LEFT JOIN "CredibilitySnapshots" AS "c0" ON "w"."Id" = "c0"."WebsiteId"
WHERE "w"."Domain" = @normalizedDomain
LIMIT 1
